log4j-core.note: Remote code execution vulnerability in Log4j 2.x

aspnet-mvc5.note: Framework version has known security issues; upgrade recommended

flask.note: Session cookie may be permanently set if server errors occur

requests.note: Proxy-Authorization header leaked on redirect to different scheme

pillow.note: Uncontrolled resource consumption via crafted image

urllib3.note: Request body not stripped on cross-origin redirect

pyyaml.note: Arbitrary code execution through yaml.load without SafeLoader

cryptography.note: NULL pointer dereference when loading PKCS7 certificates

setuptools.note: Code execution via download functions in package_index

express.note: Open redirect via crafted URL in res.redirect

axios.note: XSRF-TOKEN header leaks to cross-domain requests

jsonwebtoken.note: Unrestricted key type allows remote code execution via jwt.verify

jackson-databind.note: Denial of service via deeply nested object

spring-boot.note: Denial of service with Spring MVC and Jetty

struts2-core.note: Path traversal leading to remote code execution

entityframework6.note: Older EF may expose connection strings in error pages

newtonsoft.json.note: Stack overflow when deserializing deep JSON (affected older versions)

guava.note: Improper permission on temp files in FileBackedOutputStream

numpy.note: Buffer overflow in array creation routines
